LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 302 - DEFENDANT PATRICIA ANN WEBSTER'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (FAC) IS OVERRULED. THE FAC ADEQUATELY PLEADS A NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION. (SEE, E.G., ID. AT 1:11-13, 2:2-7, 5:22-6:17.) THAT THE FAC NOTIFIES DEFENDANT OF A PER SE THEORY IS NOT CAUSE TO SUSTAIN A DEMURRER. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE ADOPTED RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2021 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2021 Set For Trial On Sep-27-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2021 Continued To Mar-10-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM Video-conferencing:

Attorney, James G. Cheney (Attorney@JamesGCheney.com) of the Law Office of James Cheney (Tel: 925-989-5373) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant Patricia Ann Webster's demurrer to the first amended complaint (FAC) is overruled. The FAC adequately pleads a negligence cause of action. (See, e.g., id. at 1:11-13, 2:2-7, 5:22-6:17.) That the FAC notifies defendant of a per se theory is not cause to sustain a demurrer.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the adopted ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
